claimText: * NHRCI got 'A' status of accreditation first time in 1999. In 2016, NHRCI’s accreditation was deferred by a year after which it received an ‘A’ rating in 2017 by SCA of GANHRI.

claimText: * In 2023, accreditation of NHRCI was deferred. Current accreditation by GANHRI is deferred due to a lack of diversity in staff and leadership and insufficient action to protect marginalised groups.
